latHint: Think being indecisive - not a ranch boundary.
pivHint: A ranch is lined with FENCE - but sitting on the FENCE means you're doing what about a decision?
winText: Caught in the middle. FENCE was the pivot - ranch boundary to WAVER, unable to decide.
lossText: WAVER - to hesitate, undecided. FENCE was the pivot: ranch FENCE to sitting on the FENCE.
